items.definition_en: A blender is an electric machine for mixing foods or making smoothies.
items.example_en: She made a fruit smoothie in the blender.

items.definition_en: A dishwasher is a machine that washes dirty dishes and glasses.
items.example_en: The dishwasher is full of clean plates.

items.definition_en: A fan is a device that moves air around a room to keep it cool.
items.example_en: We use a fan to stay cool in summer.

items.definition_en: A heater is a machine that makes a room warmer.
items.example_en: He turned on the heater during the cold night.

items.definition_en: An iron is an electrical device used to make clothes smooth.
items.example_en: I use an iron to remove wrinkles from my shirt.

items.definition_en: A lamp is a device that gives light in a room.
items.example_en: She read her book by the lamp.

items.definition_en: A light bulb is the part of a lamp that makes light.
items.example_en: The light bulb needs to be changed.

items.definition_en: A mop is a tool for washing floors.
items.example_en: He cleaned the kitchen with a mop.

items.definition_en: A remote control is a device used to operate appliances from a distance.
items.example_en: She looked for the remote control to change the channel.

items.definition_en: A telephone is a device for talking to people who are far away.
items.example_en: I called my friend on the telephone.

items.definition_en: A television is a machine that shows pictures and sounds for people to watch.
items.example_en: The children watched cartoons on television.

items.definition_en: A vacuum cleaner is a machine that cleans floors by sucking up dirt.
items.example_en: She uses a vacuum cleaner every Saturday.

items.definition_en: An air conditioner is a machine that keeps the air in a room cool.
items.example_en: They switched on the air conditioner during the heat wave.

items.definition_en: A ceiling fan is a large fan fixed to the ceiling to move air.
items.example_en: The ceiling fan helps during hot days.

items.definition_en: A hair dryer is a device used to dry your hair after washing it.
items.example_en: She used her hair dryer in the morning.

items.definition_en: A rice cooker is a machine that cooks rice automatically.
items.example_en: He prepared dinner with his rice cooker.

items.definition_en: A steam iron is an iron that uses steam to help remove wrinkles.
items.example_en: She prefers her steam iron for shirts.

items.definition_en: A water filter is a device that makes water cleaner to drink.
items.example_en: The water filter is in the kitchen.

items.definition_en: A food processor is a machine that cuts, mixes, or prepares food quickly.
items.example_en: She uses a food processor to slice vegetables.

items.definition_en: An electric blanket is a blanket that becomes warm when plugged in.
items.example_en: He stayed warm with an electric blanket.
